electroacoustic.components: 1 x 15-inch direct-radiating cone driver, bass-reflex / L-Vent loaded
electroacoustic.max_spl_note: 137 dB peak at 1 m, half-space, pink noise crest factor 4, [SB15_100] preset

connection.input_connector: 2x 4-point speakON (NL4), one IN and one LINK for parallel routing to a second SB15m
connection.breakouts: Driven from LA8 PA-COM output via DOSUB-LA8 breakout (8-point to 4x 2-point speakON); SP-Y1 splitter (4-point to 2x 2-point speakON, with CC4FP adapter) splits paired output channels
connection.note: Parallel daisy-chaining through the LINK connector is only supported on the legacy LA8 controller

physical.cabinet: Premium-grade Baltic birch plywood; coated steel grille with Airnet acoustically neutral 3D fabric; high-strength steel rigging hardware with anti-corrosion coating
physical.finish: Dark grey-brown (Pantone 426C), pure white (RAL 9010), or custom RAL on special order

modes: Pole-mounted (35 mm socket for one XT or two KIVA enclosures)
deployment.max_per_flown_array: 8 with KIBU-SB and WLL 1 t shackle; 6 with KIBU-SB and CLAMP250 (truss). Ground-stacked: up to 8.
deployment.inter_element_spacing: Place subwoofers side by side; maximum 1.7 m between adjacent acoustic centers when not contiguous
rigging_accessories: SB15MRIG coupling bars with LOCKTAB locking tabs (2 bars / 2 tabs supplied)
KIBU-SB flying frame (supplied with two WLL 1 t bow shackles)

usage: Compact 15-inch subwoofer designed to extend the low end of the KIVA line source and XT coaxial series down to a 40 Hz (-10 dB) limit.
Each enclosure presents an 8 ohm load and needs one amp channel: budget 4 per LA4X or LA2Xi (single-ended), 9 per LA7.16(i), and up to 12 per LA12X.
Use the [SB15_100] preset for standard omnidirectional single elements or arrays, and [SB15_100_C] for cardioid blocks of four (one reversed element wired to OUT 1) to cut rear-stage spill.
Keep cabinets touching side by side; if a gap is unavoidable, never let adjacent acoustic centers exceed 1.7 m or low-frequency coupling degrades.
Flown arrays cap at 8 enclosures on a KIBU-SB with a 1 t shackle or 6 when clamped to truss via CLAMP250; ground stacks also top out at 8 - always validate stress and stability in SOUNDVISION first.
The integrated 35 mm pole socket lets a single SB15m act as a sub-on-stick base for one XT or two KIVA tops in compact deployments.
